name: Carol's Almond Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: CAROL DAVIS (TANT19A)
If you like the Ammaretti cookies, you will love these.
1. Mix together 8 ounces of almond paste, 1/2 cup of sugar, and 2 egg whites to create a messy batter.
2. Roll about 1-2 tablespoons of the batter into either pignolas (pine nuts, my favorite), flaked almonds, or no topping at all.
3. Shape the mixture into balls or crescents.
4. Bake for 10-15 minutes in a 350 degree Fahrenheit oven on brown paper on a cookie sheet, without greasing.
5. When done, carefully lift the cookies from the paper onto a wet dishtowel laid out flat on the counter (the towel must be wet, not just damp).
